waiver.reason_summary: All gate failures in this run are pre-existing on the target branch and demonstrably unrelated to the commits being pushed; the author has verified no new regressions were introduced.
waiver.detail: Manual mainline promotion from ad28ea611 after current-tip remote-validate passed. The pre-push cert gate still fails on the pre-existing repo-intake.lv3.org cert_mismatch, and a targeted live repair via playbooks/fix-edge-certificate.yml failed because Let's Encrypt CAA rechecks for matrix.lv3.org blocked issuance. The earlier protected-branch gate on this line also exposed existing ansible-lint debt unrelated to these commits.
substitute_evidence: uv run python scripts/validate_adr_status_transitions.py passed on ad28ea611
git push --dry-run origin HEAD:main reached certificate validation and failed on pre-existing repo-intake.lv3.org cert_mismatch
ansible-playbook playbooks/fix-edge-certificate.yml failed because Let's Encrypt CAA rechecks for matrix.lv3.org blocked certificate issuance
